category_sources: source_facts.description identifies LAMMPS as a Molecular Dynamics Simulator.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is lammps and official documentation uses LAMMPS branding.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official LAMMPS documentation site at docs.lammps.org.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/lammps/lammps, so repo is returned as null per instructions.
tags_sources: source_facts.executables lists MPI and serial LAMMPS binaries.
